title: Ionization reactor
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Ionization-reactor.png|thumb|An ionization reactor]]
'''Ionization reactors''' were devices that were used on board [[Starship/Legends|spacecraft]] to aid in effective space travel.

==Characteristics==
The reactor was able to convert solar energy from the surrounding space into usable starship fuel. Among the most widespread ionization reactors were the [[I-a2b solar ionization reactor/Legends|I-a2b solar ionization reactor]] and the [[I-s3a solar ionization reactor/Legends|I-s3a solar ionization reactor]].

{{Tech-stub}}
